description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 5th; Slot hands; Price 1,500 gp; Weight — DESCRIPTION These long cloth strips are intricately embroidered with urban scenes. When wrapped around your hands (like a boxer’s or mummy’s wraps) you gain a +1 competence bonus to Acrobatics checks and a +1 competence bonus to Reflex saves made to catch a ledge or arrest a fall. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, cat’s grace, jump; Cost 750 gp
